title: POTENTIOMETRIC STUDIES ON THE COMPOSITION OF NlCKEL FERROCYANIDE COMPLEX
author: RAM SAHAI SAXENA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The formation and precipitation of nickel ferrocyanide has been studied by potentiometrie titrations between nickel sulphate and potassium fcrrocyanide using ferri-ferrocyanide electrode both by the direct and the inverse methods The pint of inflection obtained from the maximum value of ∆E/∆C corresponds to the formation of a double salt having the composition 4Ni 2 Fe(CN)  3  . 3K 4 Fe(CN) 2 , with either of the substances used as the reagent. The potentiometrie curves have a regular shape ; a sharp break in potential occurs at the equivalence point and the titration results are accurate and reproducible. The effect of alcohol on the end-point as well as on the nature of curves has been studied.
steps_raw: The formation and precipitation of nickel ferrocyanide has been studied by potentiometrie titrations between nickel sulphate and potassium fcrrocyanide using ferri-ferrocyanide electrode both by the direct and the inverse methods The pint of inflection obtained from the maximum value of ∆E/∆C corresponds to the formation of a double salt having the composition 4Ni 2 Fe(CN)  3  . 3K 4 Fe(CN) 2 , with either of the substances used as the reagent. The potentiometrie curves have a regular shape ; a sharp break in potential occurs at the equivalence point and the titration results are accurate and reproducible. The effect of alcohol on the end-point as well as on the nature of curves has been studied.
